backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a quiz backend with question management, user attempt tracking, score calculation, and leaderboard functionality using Map and List data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features related to Internet Identity sign-up and authentication UI differentiation across multiple frontend components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing routing, pages, components, hooks, styling, and metadata for the Positivity Quiz application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color palettes using OKLCH color space for the wellness-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive meta tags for SEO, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, and app market discovery for the Positivity Quiz application.
frontend/public/app-manifest.json: App manifest defining metadata for Caffeine App Market including app ID, name, description, category (wellness), tags, and feature list.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, quiz, results, and profile pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with Toaster notifications.
frontend/src/components/AttemptCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual quiz attempt details including timestamp, score percentage, performance badge, and contextual feedback message based on score level.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Reusable authentication button supporting 'signin' and 'signup' variants that trigger Internet Identity login flow with appropriate icons and loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackCard.tsx: Animated card component with staggered fade-in effect displaying supportive feedback messages with check icon for quiz results.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with navigation, authentication buttons, and footer. Includes conditional rendering based on authentication status and current route.
frontend/src/components/QuizQuestion.tsx: Renders a single quiz question with radio button options. Handles answer selection and visual feedback for selected answers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Manages authentication state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching questions, submitting answers, and retrieving user attempts. Handles authentication requirements and query invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles using Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables for a warm, calming color palette (peach, pink, lavender). Includes light and dark theme definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying the wellness quiz introduction with feature cards and a call-to-action button. Shows authentication prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays user's wellness quiz history with statistics (total attempts, average score) and individual attempt cards; shows login prompt for unauthenticated users and encourages taking the quiz if no attempts exist.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Implements the wellness quiz interface with question navigation, progress tracking, and answer submission; uses backend questions if available, otherwise falls back to default questions, and stores results in localStorage for both authenticated and anonymous users.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Displays quiz results with score percentage and personalized feedback messages based on performance tiers (80%+, 60-79%, <60%); retrieves results from localStorage and prompts authenticated users to save results or anonymous users to sign up.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (warm-peach, soft-pink, gentle-lavender, calm-blue), OKLCH color system, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking existing features for Internet Identity authentication sign-up flow and pending feature request AR-1 to add sign-up option; describes project as "Positivity Quiz" (previously tic-tac-toe).
